title: Tilray Brands Delivers Record Q3 Fiscal 2026 Results with $207 Million Revenue
text: Tilray Brands delivered record-breaking $206.7 million in net revenue for fiscal 2026 third quarter with 11% organic growth. Gross profit expanded to $55 million, increasing 6% year-over-year. The International Cannabis segment saw revenue skyrocket 73% year-over-year to $24.1 million, demonstrating strong global expansion momentum. Canadian Adult-Use and Medical Cannabis Net Revenue Combined Increased 8% Year-Over-Year with Tilray maintaining #1 Cannabis Leadership Position in Canada by Revenue. The company achieved adjusted earnings per share of 2 cents, a significant turnaround from a loss of 3 cents per share in the same quarter a year ago. Tilray exceeded analyst estimates, which had projected a loss of 14 cents per share. The company reaffirmed full-year adjusted EBITDA guidance of $62 million to $72 million.
